title: thelypteris angusta
intro: Thelypteris angusta, also known as Narrow-leaved Maiden's Hair, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris angusta include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
